name: Rust SpacetimeDB
summary: Rust SpacetimeDB module stack using tables, reducers, views, and generated client-facing bindings.

items: Define persisted and synced state as SpacetimeDB tables in module code.
Expose mutations as reducers; treat each reducer as a transactional boundary.
Keep pure domain modules free of `spacetimedb` imports when the slice has domain rules.
Expose caller-scoped read surfaces with views or filtered subscriptions rather than client-side authorization assumptions.
